safestDesign.concept: AI-Driven Workflow Page Generation for Non-Entity Pages
details: Instead of defaulting to a static string template in `packages/generators/src/templates/frontend.ts`, route non-entity pages through the same rigorous AI generation pipeline used by `FrontendAppGenerator.ts` (`generateValidCode`).
Pass the page's specific 'features', 'description', and 'name' to the prompt so the AI can generate custom, functional UI (e.g., charts, multistep forms) that executes real business logic.

Since `FrontendAppGenerator.ts` is already strict about UI Authority, Error Authority, and React Query Authority, this ensures the generated workflow pages adhere to the same standards without breaking existing constraints.

preservationChain: Requirement -> Architecture Planner -> Architecture Schema -> FrontendGenerator (AI Fallback instead of Static Fallback) -> Validated React Code -> Executable Action.
preservesAuthorities: UI Authority: The AI prompt explicitly enforces Tailwind/Lucide rules.
Layout Authority: Composes within the standard Dashboard Layout.
Error/Query Authority: The AI is instructed to use React Query hooks and Error boundaries.
